### **1. Atualização de `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**
*(Adiciona detecção automática de tipo de shader e suporte a Direct3D em Linux/Mac)*

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Text;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            // Detecta automaticamente se o shader é OpenGL (Warband) ou Direct3D (outros jogos)
            bool isOpenGLShader = IsOpenGLShader(inputFile);

            if (isWarband && isOpenGLShader && !RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows))
            {
                DecompileWarbandOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows))
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
        }

        private static bool IsOpenGLShader(string inputFile)
        {
            try
            {
                // Shaders OpenGL (Warband) geralmente começam com "#version" ou têm cabeçalhos específicos
                using var reader = new StreamReader(inputFile, Encoding.UTF8);
                string firstLine = reader.ReadLine() ?? string.Empty;
                return firstLine.StartsWith("#version", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                       firstLine.Contains("GLSL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            }
            catch
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileWarbandOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada em: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada em: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

### **2. Atualização de `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**
*(Adiciona mensagem de erro mais clara para shaders não suportados)*

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (PlatformNotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (arquivo: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation of folder completed successfully. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (PlatformNotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### **3. `Core/Shaders/Shaders.cs` e `Core/Decompiler.cs` permanecem inalterados**
*(Não precisam de modificações)*

---

### **Resumo das Mudanças**
| Arquivo                          | Descrição da Mudança                                                                                     |
|----------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs` | **Adiciona detecção automática** de shaders OpenGL/Direct3D e suporte a Direct3D em Linux/Mac.          |
| `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`         | **Melhora mensagens de erro** para shaders não suportados em plataformas específicas.                   |
| `Core/Shaders/Shaders.cs`         | **Inalterado** (mantém suporte a Direct3D no Windows).                                                  |
| `Core/Decompiler.cs`              | **Inalterado** (já passa a versão do jogo para `ShaderDecompiler`).                                     |

### **Como Funciona Agora**
1. **Warband em Linux/Mac**:
   - Se o shader for OpenGL (detectado automaticamente), usa `spirv-cross`.
   - Se não for OpenGL, tenta usar `dxbc-disassembler` (para shaders Direct3D de outros jogos).

2. **Outros jogos em Linux/Mac**:
   - Sempre usa `dxbc-disassembler` para shaders Direct3D.

3. **Windows**:
   - Mantém o método atual (Direct3D nativo).

   - **Windows**: Nenhuma instalação adicional necessária.

````markdown
# Shader Decompilation Instructions

This guide explains how to decompile shaders for Mount & Blade games on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

## Prerequisites

### Windows
- No additional tools are required for Windows. The decompiler uses Direct3D natively.

### Linux/macOS
You need to install the following tools:

#### 1. For Warband (OpenGL shaders)
Install `spirv-cross`:
- **Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)**:
  ```bash
  sudo apt-get install spirv-cross
  ```
- **macOS (Homebrew)**:
  ```bash
  brew install spirv-cross
  ```
- **Manual installation**:
  Download from [SPIRV-Cross GitHub](https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and add it to your `PATH`.

#### 2. For other games (Direct3D shaders)
Install `dxbc-disassembler` (part of DirectXShaderCompiler):
- Download the latest release from [DirectXShaderCompiler GitHub](https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler/releases).
- Extract the binary (`dxbc-disassembler` or `dxbc-disassembler.exe`) and place it in:
  - Your system `PATH`, **or**
  - The project's root directory.

---

## How to Decompile Shaders

### 1. Command Line Usage
```bash
DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]
```

#### Arguments:
- `<input_file_or_folder>`: Path to the shader file (`.fx`, `.vsh`, `.psh`) or folder containing shaders.
- `[output_file_or_folder]` (optional): Path to save the decompiled output. If omitted, the output will be saved in the same directory as the input with a `.txt` extension.
- `[game_version]` (optional): Specify the game version. Defaults to `VanillaWarband`.
  Supported versions:
  - `VanillaClassic` (Mount & Blade Classic)
  - `VanillaWarband` (Mount & Blade: Warband)
  - `VanillaWFS` (Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword)
  - `WSE320` (Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0)
  - `WSE450` (Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0)
  - `Caribbean` (Mount & Blade: Caribbean)

#### Examples:
- Decompile a single shader file:
  ```bash
  DecompilerCLI mb_shader.fx decompiled_shader.txt VanillaWarband
  ```
- Decompile all shaders in a folder:
  ```bash
  DecompilerCLI shaders_folder/ decompiled_shaders/ VanillaWarband
  ```

---

### 2. Platform-Specific Behavior

#### Windows
- Uses Direct3D natively for all shader decompilation.
- No additional tools are required.

#### Linux/macOS
- **Warband (OpenGL shaders)**:
  - Automatically detects OpenGL shaders (files starting with `#version` or containing `GLSL`).
  - Uses `spirv-cross` for decompilation.
- **Other games (Direct3D shaders)**:
  - Uses `dxbc-disassembler` for decompilation.

---

### 3. Troubleshooting

#### Error: "Tool not found"
If you see an error like:
```
Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada em: spirv-cross
```
or
```
Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada em: dxbc-disassembler
```
Ensure:
1. The tool (`spirv-cross` or `dxbc-disassembler`) is installed.
2. The tool is in your `PATH` or in the project's root directory.

#### Error: "Platform not supported"
If you see:
```
A decompilação de shaders via Direct3D só é suportada no Windows.
```
- This error occurs when trying to decompile Direct3D shaders on Linux/macOS without `dxbc-disassembler`.
- Install `dxbc-disassembler` as described in the [Prerequisites](#prerequisites) section.

#### Error: "Failed to decompile shader"
- Ensure the input file is a valid shader file (`.fx`, `.vsh`, `.psh`).
- Check the file permissions.

---

### 4. Output Format
Decompiled shaders are saved as `.txt` files with the following structure:
```
[Header]
// Decompiled shader code...
```

The output directory structure mirrors the input directory structure.
````

---

| Arquivo                     | Descrição da Mudança                                                                                     |
|-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `SHADERS_DECOMPILATION.md`  | **Novo arquivo** com instruções detalhadas em inglês para decompilar shaders em todas as plataformas.  |

````markdown
# Shader Decompilation Instructions

This guide explains how to decompile shaders for Mount & Blade games on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

## Prerequisites

### Windows
- No additional tools are required for Windows. The decompiler uses Direct3D natively.

### Linux/macOS
You need to install the following tools:

#### 1. For Warband (OpenGL shaders)
Install `spirv-cross`:
- **Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)**:
  ```bash
  sudo apt-get install spirv-cross
  ```
- **macOS (Homebrew)**:
  ```bash
  brew install spirv-cross
  ```
- **Manual installation**:
  Download from [SPIRV-Cross GitHub](https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and add it to your `PATH`.

#### 2. For other games (Direct3D shaders)
Install `dxbc-disassembler` (part of DirectXShaderCompiler):
- Download the latest release from [DirectXShaderCompiler GitHub](https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler/releases).
- Extract the binary (`dxbc-disassembler` or `dxbc-disassembler.exe`) and place it in:
  - Your system `PATH`, **or**
  - The project's root directory.

---

## How to Decompile Shaders

### 1. Command Line Usage
```bash
DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]
```

#### Arguments:
- `<input_file_or_folder>`: Path to the shader file (`.fx`, `.vsh`, `.psh`) or folder containing shaders.
- `[output_file_or_folder]` (optional): Path to save the decompiled output. If omitted, the output will be saved in the same directory as the input with a `.txt` extension.
- `[game_version]` (optional): Specify the game version. Defaults to `VanillaWarband`.
  Supported versions:
  - `VanillaClassic` (Mount & Blade Classic)
  - `VanillaWarband` (Mount & Blade: Warband)
  - `VanillaWFS` (Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword)
  - `WSE320` (Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0)
  - `WSE450` (Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0)
  - `Caribbean` (Mount & Blade: Caribbean)

#### Examples:
- Decompile a single shader file:
  ```bash
  DecompilerCLI mb_shader.fx decompiled_shader.txt VanillaWarband
  ```
- Decompile all shaders in a folder:
  ```bash
  DecompilerCLI shaders_folder/ decompiled_shaders/ VanillaWarband
  ```

---

### 2. Platform-Specific Behavior

#### Windows
- Uses Direct3D natively for all shader decompilation.
- No additional tools are required.

#### Linux/macOS
- **Warband (OpenGL shaders)**:
  - Automatically detects OpenGL shaders (files starting with `#version` or containing `GLSL`).
  - Uses `spirv-cross` for decompilation.
- **Other games (Direct3D shaders)**:
  - Uses `dxbc-disassembler` for decompilation.

---

### 3. Troubleshooting

#### Error: "Tool not found"
If you see an error like:
```
Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada em: spirv-cross
```
or
```
Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada em: dxbc-disassembler
```
Ensure:
1. The tool (`spirv-cross` or `dxbc-disassembler`) is installed.
2. The tool is in your `PATH` or in the project's root directory.

#### Error: "Platform not supported"
If you see:
```
A decompilação de shaders via Direct3D só é suportada no Windows.
```
- This error occurs when trying to decompile Direct3D shaders on Linux/macOS without `dxbc-disassembler`.
- Install `dxbc-disassembler` as described in the [Prerequisites](#prerequisites) section.

#### Error: "Failed to decompile shader"
- Ensure the input file is a valid shader file (`.fx`, `.vsh`, `.psh`).
- Check the file permissions.

---

### 4. Output Format
Decompiled shaders are saved as `.txt` files with the following structure:
```
[Header]
// Decompiled HLSL/GLSL shader code
// Example output for a simple vertex shader:
struct VS_INPUT {
    float3 position : POSITION;
    float3 normal : NORMAL;
};
struct VS_OUTPUT {
    float4 position : SV_POSITION;
};
VS_OUTPUT main(VS_INPUT input) {
    VS_OUTPUT output;
    output.position = float4(input.position, 1.0);
    return output;
}
```

The output directory structure mirrors the input directory structure.
````

Entendido! Vou atualizar os arquivos para melhorar o suporte à decompilação de shaders `.fx` em todas as plataformas, garantindo que o fluxo seja automático e claro. As mudanças principais serão:

1. **`Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**: Melhorar a detecção automática de shaders `.fx` e simplificar o fluxo de decompilação.
2. **`Core/Decompiler.cs`**: Garantir que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente para o decompilador de shaders.
3. **`DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**: Adicionar mensagens de erro mais claras para shaders não suportados.

---

### **1. Atualização de `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**
*(Melhora a detecção automática e simplifica o fluxo de decompilação)*

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
using System.Text;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Shader file not found: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);

            if (isWarband && !isWindows)
            {
                // Warband em Linux/Mac usa OpenGL
                DecompileWarbandOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (isWindows)
            {
                // Windows usa Direct3D nativo
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                // Outros jogos em Linux/Mac usam dxbc-disassembler
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileWarbandOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"OpenGL decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and place it in PATH or the project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile OpenGL shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"DirectX decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) and place it in PATH or the project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile DirectX shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

---

### **2. Atualização de `Core/Decompiler.cs`**
*(Garantir que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente para o decompilador de shaders)*

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Input file not found.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Unsupported game version: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### **3. Atualização de `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**
*(Adiciona mensagens de erro mais claras para shaders não suportados)*

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");

#### <blank>  

#### shaders are .fx or .glsl deppending platform fx directx .glsl opengl  

Entendido! Vou atualizar os arquivos para lidar corretamente com shaders `.fx` (DirectX) e `.glsl` (OpenGL), dependendo da plataforma. As mudanças serão:

1. **`Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**: Detectar automaticamente o tipo de shader e usar o método correto de decompilação.
2. **`Core/Decompiler.cs`**: Garantir que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente.
3. **`DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**: Melhorar mensagens de erro.

---

### **1. Atualização de `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**
*(Detecta automaticamente `.fx` ou `.glsl` e usa o método correto)*

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

### **2. Atualização de `Core/Decompiler.cs`**
*(Garantir que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente)*

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### **3. Atualização de `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**
*(Melhorar mensagens de erro para shaders não suportados)*

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (file: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation of folder completed successfully. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

| `Core/Decompiler.cs`              | Garante que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente para o decompilador de shaders.                 |
| `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`        | Melhora mensagens de erro para shaders não suportados.                                                 |

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {

                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",

                {

                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";

### 2. Atualização de `Core/Decompiler.cs`
*(Garantir que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente para o decompilador de shaders)*

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (file: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation of folder completed successfully. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### 1. Arquivo atualizado: `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

### 2. Arquivo atualizado: `Core/Decompiler.cs`

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 3. Arquivo atualizado: `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (file: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation of folder completed successfully. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### Resumo das alterações realizadas:
1. **`Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`**: Implementa lógica para detectar automaticamente shaders `.fx` (DirectX) e `.glsl` (OpenGL) e usar o método correto de decompilação.
2. **`Core/Decompiler.cs`**: Garante que a versão do jogo seja passada corretamente para o decompilador de shaders.
3. **`DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`**: Melhora mensagens de erro para shaders não suportados.

using System.Collections.Generic;

1. **Extensão do arquivo** (`.fx` ou `.glsl`)
2. **Plataforma** (Windows, Linux ou macOS)
3. **Versão do jogo** (Warband usa OpenGL em Linux/macOS, outros jogos usam DirectX)
