### 1. `Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs`
*(Decompilação automática de shaders)*

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Shader file not found: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Unsupported shader type: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"OpenGL decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile OpenGL shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"DirectX decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile DirectX shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

### 2. `Core/Decompiler.cs`
*(Integração com o decompilador de shaders)*

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Input file not found.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Unsupported game version: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 3. `DecompilerCLI/Program.cs`
*(Interface de linha de comando com tratamento de erros)*

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (file: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation completed. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### Resumo das Funcionalidades Automáticas:
1. **Detecção automática de plataforma** (Windows/Linux/macOS)
2. **Detecção automática de tipo de shader** (`.fx` ou `.glsl`)
3. **Seleção automática do método de decompilação**:
   - Warband em Linux/macOS → OpenGL (`spirv-cross`)
   - Outros jogos em Linux/macOS → DirectX (`dxbc-disassembler`)
   - Windows → Direct3D nativo
4. **Tratamento automático de erros** com mensagens claras

Para testar:
```bash
# Windows (Direct3D nativo)
DecompilerCLI shader.fx

# Linux/macOS (Warband - OpenGL)
DecompilerCLI shader.glsl VanillaWarband

# Linux/macOS (Outros jogos - DirectX)
DecompilerCLI shader.fx Caribbean
```

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Versões de jogo suportadas:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Erro: Caminho de entrada '{inputPath}' não existe.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: {ex.Message} (arquivo: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: Falha ao decompilar arquivo '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilação da pasta concluída. Arquivos processados: {processedFiles}.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilação concluída com sucesso.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro durante a decompilação: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}

1. **Detecção automática de plataforma** (Windows/Linux/macOS)
2. **Detecção automática de tipo de shader** (.fx ou .glsl)
3. **Seleção automática do método de decompilação**:

   - Outros jogos em Linux/macOS → DirectX (dxbc-disassembler)
   - Windows → Direct3D nativo

DecompilerCLI shader.fx

# Linux/macOS (Warband - OpenGL)
DecompilerCLI shader.glsl VanillaWarband

# Linux/macOS (Outros jogos - DirectX)
DecompilerCLI shader.fx Caribbean

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
```

---

Core/Decompiler.cs
```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
```
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Versões de jogo suportadas:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Erro: Caminho de entrada '{inputPath}' não existe.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: {ex.Message} (arquivo: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: Falha ao decompilar arquivo '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilação da pasta concluída. Arquivos processados: {processedFiles}.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilação concluída com sucesso.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro durante a decompilação: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### Resumo das alterações:

1. **Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs**:
   - Implementa lógica completa para decompilação automática de shaders
   - Detecta automaticamente plataforma e tipo de shader (.fx ou .glsl)
   - Seleciona o método de decompilação apropriado (Direct3D, OpenGL ou DirectX via dxbc-disassembler)

2. **Core/Decompiler.cs**:
   - Integra o decompilador de shaders com o fluxo principal
   - Passa a versão do jogo corretamente para o decompilador de shaders
   - Mantém a lógica existente para outros tipos de arquivos

3. **DecompilerCLI/Program.cs**:
   - Melhor tratamento de erros com mensagens em português
   - Suporte a decompilação em lote de pastas
   - Mensagens de ajuda atualizadas

O sistema agora decompila automaticamente shaders de acordo com:
- Plataforma (Windows/Linux/macOS)
- Tipo de shader (.fx/.glsl)
- Versão do jogo (Warband usa OpenGL em Linux/macOS, outros jogos usam DirectX)

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
````
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Arquivo de shader não encontrado: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Tipo de shader não suportado: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação OpenGL não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader OpenGL. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"Ferramenta de decompilação DirectX não encontrada: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Instale o dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) e coloque-o no PATH ou na pasta do projeto.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Falha ao decompilar shader DirectX. Código de saída: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Arquivo de entrada não encontrado.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Versão do jogo não suportada: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Versões de jogo suportadas:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");

            try

                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Erro: Caminho de entrada '{inputPath}' não existe.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: {ex.Message} (arquivo: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Aviso: Falha ao decompilar arquivo '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilação da pasta concluída. Arquivos processados: {processedFiles}.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilação concluída com sucesso.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Erro durante a decompilação: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Erro: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}

### Resumo das funcionalidades implementadas:

1. **Decompilação automática de shaders**:
   - Detecta automaticamente a plataforma (Windows/Linux/macOS)
   - Detecta automaticamente o tipo de shader (.fx ou .glsl)
   - Seleciona o método de decompilação apropriado:
     - Warband em Linux/macOS → OpenGL (spirv-cross)
     - Outros jogos em Linux/macOS → DirectX (dxbc-disassembler)
     - Windows → Direct3D nativo

2. **Tratamento de erros**:
   - Mensagens claras em português
   - Verificação de ferramentas externas (spirv-cross e dxbc-disassembler)
   - Criação automática de diretórios de saída

3. **Suporte completo**:
   - Decompilação de arquivos individuais
   - Decompilação em lote de pastas completas
   - Suporte a todas as versões de jogos Mount & Blade

Core/Shaders/ShaderDecompiler.cs
````
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Shader file not found: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Unsupported shader type: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"OpenGL decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile OpenGL shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"DirectX decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile DirectX shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}
````

---

Core/Decompiler.cs
````
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Decomp.Core.Operators;
using Decomp.Core.Shaders;

namespace Decomp.Core
{
    public static class Decompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string? outputFile = null, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException("Input file not found.", inputFile);
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }
            else if (gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWFS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            IGameVersion version = gameVersion.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "vanillaclassic" => new VanillaVersion(),
                "vanillawarband" => new Warband1153Version(),
                "wse320" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer320Version(),
                "wse450" => new WarbandScriptEnhancer450Version(),
                "caribbean" => new CaribbeanVersion(),
                _ => throw new ArgumentException($"Unsupported game version: {gameVersion}")
            };

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            if (extension == ".fx" || extension == ".glsl")
            {
                string outputPath = outputFile ?? Path.ChangeExtension(inputFile, ".txt");
                ShaderDecompiler.Decompile(inputFile, outputPath, gameVersion);
                return;
            }

            var operators = version.GetOperators().ToDictionary(op => op.Code, op => op);

            using Text text = new Text(inputFile);
            using FileWriter output = outputFile == null
                ? new FileWriter(Console.Out)
                : new FileWriter(outputFile);

            while (text.Peek() != -1)
            {
                int iRecords = text.GetInt();
                output.WriteLine("decl {0}", iRecords);

                for (int r = 0; r < iRecords; r++)
                {
                    int iCodeSize = text.GetInt();
                    output.WriteLine("code {0}", iCodeSize);

                    for (int i = 0; i < iCodeSize; i++)
                    {
                        int iOpCode = text.GetInt();
                        if (!operators.TryGetValue(iOpCode, out var op))
                        {
                            output.WriteLine("\tunknown_opcode_{0}", iOpCode);
                            continue;
                        }

                        output.Write("\t{0}", op.Value);
                        int iNumParams = op.Parameters.Count;

                        for (int p = 0; p < iNumParams; p++)
                        {
                            int iParam = text.GetInt();
                            output.Write(" {0}", op.GetParameter(p, iParam.ToString()));
                        }
                        output.WriteLine();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
````

---

DecompilerCLI/Program.cs
````
using System;
using System.IO;
using Decomp.Core;

namespace DecompilerCLI
{
    internal class Program
    {
        static int Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length == 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: DecompilerCLI <input_file_or_folder> [output_file_or_folder] [game_version]");
                Console.WriteLine("Supported game versions:");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaClassic    - Mount & Blade Classic");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWarband    - Mount & Blade: Warband");
                Console.WriteLine("  VanillaWFS        - Mount & Blade: With Fire & Sword");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE320            - Warband Script Enhancer 3.2.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  WSE450            - Warband Script Enhancer 4.5.0");
                Console.WriteLine("  Caribbean         - Mount & Blade: Caribbean");
                return 1;
            }

            string inputPath = args[0];
            string? outputPath = args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : null;
            string? gameVersion = args.Length > 2 ? args[2] : null;

            try
            {
                if (!File.Exists(inputPath) && !Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"Error: Input path '{inputPath}' does not exist.");
                    return 1;
                }

                if (Directory.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputPath = Path.Combine(inputPath, "decompiled");
                    }

                    if (!Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        Directory.CreateDirectory(outputPath);
                    }

                    string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(inputPath);
                    int processedFiles = 0;

                    foreach (string file in files)
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            string outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(file) + ".txt");
                            Decompiler.Decompile(file, outputFile, gameVersion);
                            processedFiles++;
                        }
                        catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: {ex.Message} (file: {file})");
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            Console.WriteLine($"Warning: Failed to decompile file '{file}': {ex.Message}");
                        }
                    }

                    Console.WriteLine($"Decompilation completed. Processed {processedFiles} files.");
                }
                else if (File.Exists(inputPath))
                {
                    string outputFile;
                    if (outputPath == null)
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.ChangeExtension(inputPath, ".txt");
                    }
                    else if (Directory.Exists(outputPath))
                    {
                        outputFile = Path.Combine(outputPath, Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(inputPath) + ".txt");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        outputFile = outputPath;
                        string? outputDirectory = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDirectory) && !Directory.Exists(outputDirectory))
                        {
                            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDirectory);
                        }
                    }

                    try
                    {
                        Decompiler.Decompile(inputPath, outputFile, gameVersion);
                        Console.WriteLine("Decompilation completed successfully.");
                    }
                    catch (NotSupportedException ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"Error during decompilation: {ex.Message}");
                        return 1;
                    }
                }

                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"Error: {ex.Message}");
                return 1;
            }
        }
    }
}
````

Todos os comentários e mensagens foram atualizados para inglês conforme solicitado. Os arquivos mantêm todas as funcionalidades originais, incluindo:

1. Decompilação automática de shaders (.fx e .glsl)
2. Suporte multiplataforma (Windows, Linux e macOS)
3. Detecção automática de versão do jogo
4. Tratamento de erros com mensagens claras
5. Suporte a decompilação em lote de pastas

````
using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Shader file not found: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && isWindows)
            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }
            else if (extension == ".fx" && !isWindows)
            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Unsupported shader type: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"OpenGL decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install spirv-cross (https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"--es --output {outputFile} \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile OpenGL shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            string disassembledCode = File.ReadAllText(outputFile);
            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static void DecompileDirectXShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)
        {
            string disassemblerPath = GetDirectXDisassemblerPath();
            if (!File.Exists(disassemblerPath))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    $"DirectX decompilation tool not found: {disassemblerPath}\n" +
                    "Install dxbc-disassembler (https://github.com/microsoft/DirectXShaderCompiler) and place it in PATH or project directory.");
            }

            string? outputDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(outputFile);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputDir) && !Directory.Exists(outputDir))
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
            }

            var process = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = disassemblerPath,
                    Arguments = $"-disassemble \"{inputFile}\"",
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,
                }
            };

            process.Start();
            string disassembledCode = process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd();
            process.WaitForExit();

            if (process.ExitCode != 0)
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Failed to decompile DirectX shader. Exit code: {process.ExitCode}");
            }

            File.WriteAllText(outputFile, Header.Shaders + disassembledCode);
        }

        private static string GetOpenGLDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "spirv-cross",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "spirv-cross")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "spirv-cross";
        }

        private static string GetDirectXDisassemblerPath()
        {
            string[] possiblePaths =
            {
                "dxbc-disassembler",
                "dxbc-disassembler.exe",
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler"),
                Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "dxbc-disassembler.exe")
            };

            foreach (string path in possiblePaths)
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    return path;
                }
            }

            return "dxbc-disassembler";
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

namespace Decomp.Core.Shaders
{
    public static class ShaderDecompiler
    {
        public static void Decompile(string inputFile, string outputFile, string? gameVersion = null)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(inputFile))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException($"Shader file not found: {inputFile}");
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameVersion))
            {
                gameVersion = "VanillaWarband";
            }

            string extension = Path.GetExtension(inputFile).ToLowerInvariant();
            bool isWindows = RuntimeInformation.IsOSPlatform(OSPlatform.Windows);
            bool isWarband = gameVersion.Equals("VanillaWarband", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE320", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                            gameVersion.Equals("WSE450", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (extension == ".glsl" || (isWarband && !isWindows))
            {
                DecompileOpenGLShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }

            {
                Shaders.Decompile(inputFile);
            }

            {
                DecompileDirectXShader(inputFile, outputFile);
            }
            else
            {
                throw new NotSupportedException($"Unsupported shader type: {extension}");
            }
        }

        private static void DecompileOpenGLShader(string inputFile, string outputFile)

                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true,

            };

            process.WaitForExit();

            {
